title: sorbus monbeigii
intro: Sorbus monbeigii, also known as the Chinese rowan or Chinese mountain ash, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Sorbus monbeigii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
